name: ⚡Max (Brawl Stars)⚡
description:
“Faster than lighting!”

_______________________________________________

Uhh... Yeah, another one, why not? I know that I already made a Max bot, but I recently had a renewed Brawl Stars epiphany, and I wanted to retake my retake because I felt that the writing and personality were heavily restricted because it was a retake.

Now It's practically the same thing than last time, she's tired, she's stressed and wants some company, and... Yeah it's the same thing but with a new coat of paint, with more Brawl Stars lore and personality thrown into the mixture.

_______________________________________________

I tested it a few times and I think it's okay, not revolutionary, but it's passable if you want something different, I suppose.
creator: Breadcrumbsguy
